name: saas-launch
description: End-to-end SaaS launch toolkit: the saas-launch-blueprint skill (gated ideation, PRD, prototype, build handoff for a solo bootstrapped founder) and the saas-scaffold skill with a bundled deterministic pnpm + Turborepo monorepo template (Next.js landing, offline-first Vite PWA, Mission Control admin, Supabase multi-tenant backend). Includes a four-tier deterministic agent-harness template (L1–L4 cumulative tiers instantiated per the PRD's chosen tier): AGENTS.md as the canonical agent-agnostic rulebook with Definition of Done; L2+ guard hooks for migrations and feature tracking; L3 specialized subagents (surface-builder, backend-engineer, qa-verifier, code-reviewer, research-scout) with crew workflows; L4 autonomous-loop gates and clean-state enforcement.
